skill.name: nature-reviewer
skill.description: Simulates a Nature-style peer review from the referee perspective. It evaluates manuscript drafts, abstracts, sections, figures, or author notes against local Nature editorial criteria and returns three reviewer reports plus a cross-review synthesis.
skill.summary: Creates a bounded Nature-style reviewer assessment with three reports and one synthesis.
skill.author: Yuan1z0825

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported command, network, weak-crypto, reconnaissance, and entropy patterns, but context shows they are false positives in markdown documentation. The skill contains no executable code, scripts, runtime network calls, credential access, data exfiltration, or prompt-injection attempts.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Flagged as External Commands
low_findings.description: The external command detections are markdown inline code labels and fenced output examples. No shell, Ruby, script, or executable command invocation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged lines are prose, inline identifiers, or text output templates. I found no executable file, script body, shell command, or user-input command construction.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Academic Prose Flagged as Weak Crypto or Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: The high-risk blocker detections match words used in editorial guidance, such as weak manuscript evidence and assessment boundaries. They do not describe cryptography or host reconnaissance.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file context is academic review criteria and safe phrasing guidance. No crypto API, hash algorithm choice, system probing command, or environment inspection appears there.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Documentation URL Flagged as Network Risk
low_findings.description: The single hardcoded URL is a cited Nature editorial criteria source in the README. The skill does not fetch that URL or make runtime network requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The URL appears inside a text block documenting source provenance. There is no executable code path, HTTP client, or instruction to transmit user data.

content.value_statement: Manuscript authors often miss reviewer objections before submission. This skill produces a bounded Nature-style assessment with three reports and a synthesis.
actual_capabilities: Reviews manuscript drafts, abstracts, sections, figure legends, and author notes.
Applies local Nature criteria for originality, importance, broad interest, technical soundness, and readability.
Produces three reviewer reports that differ by emphasis, not invented identities.
Creates a cross-review synthesis covering consensus strengths, risks, and emphasis differences.
Flags unsupported claims, missing evidence, and material that is not assessable.
limitations: Grounded only in the local Nature editorial source and local implementation rules.
Does not make or predict a final editorial acceptance decision.
Does not invent reviewer identities, institutions, specialties, or hidden knowledge.
Does not draft author rebuttals or point-by-point response letters.

use_cases.title: Pre-Submission Manuscript Review
use_cases.description: Stress-test a draft before journal submission and identify major reviewer concerns early.

use_cases.title: Broad-Interest Positioning Check
use_cases.description: Assess whether a paper explains significance for interdisciplinary and nonspecialist readers.

use_cases.title: Technical Soundness Audit
use_cases.description: Find missing controls, validation gaps, and unsupported claims before formal peer review.

prompt_templates.title: Review My Draft
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this manuscript draft from a Nature-style referee perspective. Return three reviewer reports and a cross-review synthesis.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request with a full draft

prompt_templates.title: Check My Abstract
prompt_templates.prompt: Assess this abstract for originality, scientific importance, broad interest, and likely reviewer concerns. Mark what is not assessable.

prompt_templates.title: Find Technical Gaps
prompt_templates.prompt: Review these methods and results sections. Identify technical failings that block the authors case from being established.

prompt_templates.title: Stress-Test Nature Fit
prompt_templates.prompt: Evaluate this manuscript package against the local Nature-style review axes. Separate technical validity from broad-interest significance.

output_examples.input: A manuscript excerpt claiming a new CRISPR variant with broad therapeutic implications.
output: Review setup states that methods and results were provided, but full figures were missing.
Reviewer 1 emphasizes technical validation and asks for stronger off-target evidence.
Reviewer 2 questions whether the therapeutic breadth claim is supported by the data.
Reviewer 3 finds the broad-interest framing promising but hard for nonspecialists to follow.
The synthesis identifies validation depth as the main issue to resolve.

output_examples.input: An abstract claiming a machine learning method improves protein structure prediction.
output: The review marks the assessment as abstract-only and limited in confidence.
The reports request benchmark comparisons before judging technical soundness.
The synthesis separates potential interdisciplinary interest from demonstrated importance.
Unsupported claims are listed as author input needed.

best_practices: Provide the full manuscript or complete sections when possible.
State which material is missing so boundaries are explicit.
Use the synthesis to prioritize revisions before submission.
anti_patterns: Do not treat the reports as an editorial decision.
Do not ask for invented reviewer identities or hidden expertise.
Do not use this skill for author rebuttal drafting.

faq.question: Does this skill decide if Nature will accept my paper?
faq.answer: No. It gives referee-style feedback and avoids claiming the editor final decision.

faq.question: Can I provide only an abstract?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill gives a bounded review and marks missing evidence clearly.

faq.question: Why are there three reviewer reports?
faq.answer: The skill creates three emphasis patterns to expose different review risks from one fact base.

faq.question: Will it invent specialist reviewers?
faq.answer: No. It does not create identities, institutions, specialties, or private reviewer knowledge.

faq.question: Can it review for journals other than Nature?
faq.answer: It can provide peer-review style critique, but its criteria come from local Nature sources.

faq.question: Does it send my manuscript to Nature or another website?
faq.answer: No. The skill is documentation-only and contains no runtime network calls.
